calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendants Relevant Group LLC, Morrison Hotel LLC and Morrison Residential LLC.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Deputy Gomez and Deputy Jones; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:30:49 a.m., and concluding at 9:46:35 a.m. (D505)

Andrew Catterall, Esq. representing Plaintiff TopFlight Specs Inc.
Defendants Relevant Group LLC, Morrison Hotel LLC and Morrison Residential LLC not appearing.
Witness Richard Fiory, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Complaint filed Sep-12-2023.
Proof of service as to Defendants filed Sep-25-2023.
Default entered on Oct-30-2023 and Oct-31-2023.
Dismissal of the Doe Defendants filed Feb-09-2024.

Counsel to provide a summary in support of the request for judgment.
Court examines witness. Witness testifies.

Proposed judgment is discussed.
Counsel confirms with the Court that the request for judgment shall resolve the entire case.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants jointly and severally:

Damages $43,225.00
Interest $1,740.48
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $627.20
Total Judgment $45,592.68

Proposed judgment as amended signed and executed this day.
